arts.ttl: I saw Manchester United practice a move they should have scored from vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man Utd drew 1-1 with Real Sociedad in Spain and produced a performance that probably deserved more.

arts.ttl: 'We should feel' - Joshua Zirkzee interview gives insight into Manchester United dressing room
arts.sum: Man United drew 1-1 with Real Sociedad in the first leg of their Europa League round-of-16 tie on Thursday evening.

arts.ttl: Man Utd told to immediately sack Ruben Amorim and hire Roy Keane as new manager
arts.sum: Teddy Sheringham reckons ex-skipper Roy Keane would be the perfect man to go into the dressing-room and deliver some home truths to the players in his no-nonsense, uncompromising style

arts.ttl: Man Utd job cuts cast in damning light as report points to new Ineos problem
arts.sum: UEFA's finance and investment report says there has been a 33 per cent increase in staff across clubs since 2019 - just as Manchester United plan to trim their workforce again

arts.ttl: All reason and evidence tells us that Manchester United should sack Ruben Amorim - here's the alarming reason why they won't, writes IAN LADYMAN
arts.sum: IAN LADYMAN: United are desperate, all right. Desperate not to go back to square one. Desperate not to have to start all over again. Desperate not to admit they've got it wrong once more.

arts.ttl: Report: Ruben Amorim’s potential replacement eyes Man United overhaul with three players earmarked to leave
arts.sum: Former Barcelona head coach Xavi is reportedly continuing to lay down his transfer demands amid growing speculation that he could replace Ruben Amorim as Manchester United’s manager this summer. The 45-year-old is being tipped as a potential successor to Amorim, whose tenure at Old Trafford has been marked by a disappointing run of form. However, […] The post Report: Ruben Amorim’s potential replacement eyes Man United overhaul with three players earmarked to leave appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives his verdict on Rasmus Hojlund's rant at 'criminal' Diogo Dalot as Man United are left frustrated by draw at Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Man United were left ruing an opportunity missed after Thursday's 1-1 draw at Real Sociedad. They took the lead in through Joshua Zirkzee but were pegged back by a Mikel Oyarzabal penalty.

arts.ttl: “They are one of the best teams in Europe” – Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil on Manchester United
arts.sum: Real Sociedad are in a rather precarious position in their Europa League tie with Manchester United, following a 1-1 draw in the first leg on Thursday. However, it could have been worse, as they had trailed at the Reale Arena before Mikel Oyarzabal scored from the penalty spot. It was a relatively poor performance from […] The post “They are one of the best teams in Europe” – Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil on Manchester United appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes gives verdict on 'strange' penalty decision against Bruno Fernandes as Man United are held to a draw at Real Sociedad
arts.sum: The hosts were given the opportunity to level proceedings 20 minutes from time when VAR official Pol van Boekel spotted that Fernandes had handled the ball with his left arm in the area.

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes slams Alejandro Garnacho for 'sulking' AGAIN after being substituted in Man United's draw with Real Sociedad - just a week he did the same against Ipswich
arts.sum: United's poor form continued on Thursday night as they drew 1-1 with the LaLiga side in the Europa League, with Joshua Zirkzee 's opener cancelled out following a handball.
